requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for Paraguay PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——巴拉圭光伏逆变器IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——巴拉圭光伏逆變器IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列證據

summary.en: For Paraguay PV inverter projects, EMC evidence should be prepared in IEC terms acceptable to the local project reviewer, INTN conformity route, and ANDE connection review. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for photovoltaic power conversion equipment, while the IEC 61000 series supplies test methods and limits for emissions, immunity, harmonics, and flicker where applicable. Paraguay-specific inverter EMC regulations are not clearly published as a separate solar-inverter approval regime, so exporters should expect project documents to request IEC 62920, IEC 61000-3-2, IEC 61000-3-3, IEC 61000-6-2, or IEC 61000-6-4 evidence depending on power rating, installation environment, and ANDE or owner requirements.
summary.zh: 针对巴拉圭光伏逆变器项目，EMC证据应以当地项目审查方、INTN合格评定路径及ANDE接入审查可接受的IEC术语准备。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准，IEC 61000系列则在适用时提供发射、抗扰度、谐波和闪烁的测试方法及限值。巴拉圭尚未明确公布单独的太阳能逆变器EMC批准制度，因此出口商应预期项目文件可能根据功率等级、安装环境及ANDE或业主要求索取IEC 62920、IEC 61000-3-2、IEC 61000-3-3、IEC 61000-6-2或IEC 61000-6-4证据。
summary.zht: 針對巴拉圭光伏逆變器項目，EMC證據應以當地項目審查方、INTN合格評定路徑及ANDE接入審查可接受的IEC術語準備。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準，IEC 61000系列則在適用時提供發射、抗擾度、諧波和閃爍的測試方法及限值。巴拉圭尚未明確公布單獨的太陽能逆變器EMC批准制度，因此出口商應預期項目文件可能根據功率等級、安裝環境及ANDE或業主要求索取IEC 62920、IEC 61000-3-2、IEC 61000-3-3、IEC 61000-6-2或IEC 61000-6-4證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions where applicable
IEC 61000-3-3 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker where applicable
IEC 61000-6-2 / IEC 61000-6-4 — Generic industrial immunity and emission standards where specified by the project

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence commonly appears inside GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 test reports, with CNAS laboratory results and Chinese-language certificates. Those reports may reference IEC 61000-family methods, but they are not automatically equivalent to an IEC 62920 report or to the exact EMC scope requested by a Paraguay project. The exporter should confirm whether the report covers the supplied model, power rating, firmware and filter configuration, test voltage, grid frequency, emissions ports, immunity tests, and harmonic limits relevant to the Paraguay installation.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常出现在GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004测试报告中，并附有CNAS实验室结果和中文证书。上述报告可能引用IEC 61000系列方法，但并不自动等同于IEC 62920报告，也不自动满足巴拉圭项目要求的准确EMC范围。出口商应确认报告是否覆盖供应型号、功率等级、固件及滤波配置、测试电压、电网频率、发射端口、抗扰度测试和与巴拉圭安装相关的谐波限值。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常出現在GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004測試報告中，並附有CNAS實驗室結果和中文證書。上述報告可能引用IEC 61000系列方法，但並不自動等同於IEC 62920報告，也不自動滿足巴拉圭項目要求的準確EMC範圍。出口商應確認報告是否覆蓋供應型號、功率等級、韌體及濾波配置、測試電壓、電網頻率、發射端口、抗擾度測試和與巴拉圭安裝相關的諧波限值。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes inverter performance and grid-connection requirements

gap.en: Gap: GB/T or NB/T EMC test evidence should be mapped to IEC 62920 and the relevant IEC 61000 clauses before Paraguay submission. Where the China report does not explicitly list IEC 62920, does not cover the supplied model variant, or was tested under materially different voltage/configuration conditions, obtain supplementary IEC EMC testing from an accredited laboratory. The EMC package should be aligned with the ANDE connection dossier and any INTN conformity pathway requested by the importer or authority.
gap.zh: 差距：在提交巴拉圭前，应将GB/T或NB/T EMC测试证据映射至IEC 62920及相关IEC 61000条款。若中国报告未明确列出IEC 62920、未覆盖供应型号变体，或在显著不同的电压/配置条件下测试，应从认可实验室取得补充IEC EMC测试。EMC文件包应与ANDE接入档案及进口商或主管机构要求的任何INTN合格评定路径保持一致。
gap.zht: 差距：在提交巴拉圭前，應將GB/T或NB/T EMC測試證據映射至IEC 62920及相關IEC 61000條款。若中國報告未明確列出IEC 62920、未覆蓋供應型號變體，或在顯著不同的電壓/配置條件下測試，應從認可實驗室取得補充IEC EMC測試。EMC文件包應與ANDE接入檔案及進口商或主管機構要求的任何INTN合格評定路徑保持一致。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but expected where ANDE, INTN, importer, or project-owner documentation requests IEC EMC evidence for grid-tied equipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T and NB/T EMC reports support China domestic technical review but do not automatically satisfy Paraguay IEC/NP or project-owner evidence requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume a Chinese GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 EMC report is enough for Paraguay. Prepare an IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 cross-reference, confirm model and configuration coverage, and obtain supplementary accredited IEC EMC testing if the project owner, INTN route, or ANDE reviewer requires it.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应假定中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004 EMC报告足以用于巴拉圭。应准备IEC 62920和IEC 61000交叉引用，确认型号及配置覆盖范围，并在项目业主、INTN路径或ANDE审查方要求时取得补充认可IEC EMC测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應假定中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004 EMC報告足以用於巴拉圭。應準備IEC 62920和IEC 61000交叉引用，確認型號及配置覆蓋範圍，並在項目業主、INTN路徑或ANDE審查方要求時取得補充認可IEC EMC測試。
